## ShParseErrorInfo interface

Position info attached to a [ShParseError](./sh-ast.shparseerror.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ShParseErrorInfo 
```

[column](./sh-ast.shparseerrorinfo.column.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

number


</td><td>

1-based column number, in \*\*UTF-16 code units\*\* — converted from mvdan/sh's own byte-counting column so it agrees with [ShNode.loc](./sh-ast.shnode.loc.md)<!-- -->'s columns (mvdan/sh reports `column` as a byte count on the source line, not a UTF-16 code unit count; see design/ARCHITECTURE.md's "Byte→UTF-16 conversion"). For ASCII-only source text this is numerically identical to mvdan/sh's own column.


</td></tr>

[filename](./sh-ast.shparseerrorinfo.filename.md)


</td><td>

string

The filename used for the parse (see [ParseOptions.filename](./sh-ast.parseoptions.filename.md)<!-- -->).


</td></tr>

[line](./sh-ast.shparseerrorinfo.line.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

number


</td><td>

1-based line number, exactly as reported by mvdan/sh.


</td></tr>
